title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Lords Mobile: Kingdom Wars
notes:
Football fever has gripped not just the world, but the Kingdoms of Athena as well!
Take part in the Lords Ball Carnival to get an event Castle Skin, Army Skin, Route Skin, Turf Decorations, Emotes, and many more!

# Various UI adjustments:
．Guild Fest: Added special quest requirement note to Gear Crafting quests: "Must unlock the Lunar Foundry to complete quest"
．Hero Stages: Added Hero Ultimate skill range display during Auto Battle
．Revamped the Shelter's interface (Only affects Quick Battle)

title: F1® Clash - Official 2026 Game
notes:
Our latest F1® Clash Update contains:

- Objectives improvements.

- New Watch to Earn Offers available in the Store.

- Visual track upgrades for both Silverstone and Interlagos.

- Additional updates, bug fixes, backend and optimisation changes.

Please see our dedicated blog post for more details on changes in Update 58.
